name: EON Resources Inc.
business: EON Resources Inc. is an independent oil and natural gas company focused on the acquisition, development, exploration, production and divestiture of oil and natural gas properties in the Permian Basin. As of December 31, 2024, the company owns a 100% working interest in 13,700 gross acres located in the Grayburg-Jackson Field in Eddy County, New Mexico, and generates revenue from the sale of crude oil and natural gas. The company operates through its wholly owned subsidiary Pogo Resources, LLC and its subsidiary LH Operating, LLC.
sellsTo: crude oil and natural gas purchasers

exposures.sentence: As of December 31, 2024, 100% of the Company’s properties were located exclusively within the Northwest Shelf of the Permian Basin.

catalysts.event: Closing of Purchase, Sale, Termination and Exchange Agreement
catalysts.sentence: If the Closing does not occur prior to 1:00 p.m. Central Time on June 3, 2025, the Agreement will automatically terminate.
